src: Search abstraction over different search engines written in PHP. Currently implemented Elasticsearch, Opensearch, Algolia, Meilisearch, Loupe, RediSearch, Solr, Typesense. Documentation: https://php-cmsig.github.io/search/
ja: PHPで書かれた複数の検索エンジンに対応する検索抽象化ライブラリ。現在Elasticsearch、Opensearch、Algolia、Meilisearch、Loupe、RediSearch、Solr、Typesenseに対応
